textByHash.ac49030e63ea36ffdf5738c41e5d7b9fa6757ecd: Anything to do with that demon you summoned on my docks?
textByHash.51f1ae9b3971a65b6b14097fcc834c7411749b0e: I'd have preferred it be done without demons being involved. Idiots will be idiots, I suppose.
textByHash.edbbaf8cea10662436223949b3d784494613e52a: Come on then, tell me about this latest Council nonsense.
textByHash.abd085d3f9dfb6b5e7dc95f9670796164bdb8672: Oh I'm sorry. Is my secret hideout in the sewers not private enough for you now?
textByHash.a8378a0fe8db1462436febaff04a35a348af391a: Fine. But if you waste my time you will seriously regret it.
textByHash.b8bc6b9bb47a67c52bb0408ac3259f3ff58151e7: Do you want to get off my back? I already said I'll meet you there. Now clear off.
textByHash.094444ddde53a2077931d2cf61fdc9c9dd192b63: What on Gielinor are you fools on about? Killed who?
textByHash.e460780cc3181e77c9ed8fb9f1190932044162ae: Could you idiots please stop arguing and give us an explanation!
textByHash.e2404b4886e505638fd40a4d78528e43f3f71111: So it's true! I always knew the Council was corrupt, and now we have the proof!
textByHash.5b4212edfe283caf4c28d7650c0c3f4ea4282192: You'd see us go back to a king? The democracy of the Council was false, but democracy is still the answer. Let the people decide!
textByHash.38520663def5f6309845255407b6f512d1948663: Don't you lecture me you warmongering fool! I've done more for this kingdom than you'll ever know!
textByHash.32b9afea7786d0d556eae8a254573bc27adf406d: Well don't go thinking you're getting me to sign it. I'll have no part in this.
textByHash.a4132350ef38771889e1aee5d834405f46447cdb: Don't waste your time. I will never sign that thing.
textByHash.2887e18173afca51bb98d98e274700231743fc69: Of course not, you fool. Did you not listen earlier? The people should decide, not us.
textByHash.edcdc2a7260b77d8171e8aaccc5b479f42482b18: It would still see us return to a single ruler.
textByHash.035b4a9ab6cc99c6ca5b7e1f9ab2a51d4dc646f9: Fine. It's still a stupid move, but if there's to be a vote, I might be willing to support it.
textByHash.28f7b9cd4c72256ebfc17f97050da42602410d11: Yes. First, there's something else we need to discuss.
textByHash.0c582e457bb66a28cf43a019bf6b0fca0117bf34: While you've been running around chasing dead princesses and mad mages, you've forgotten what started all of this. You summoned a demon in my home!
textByHash.ac95e6d64704234340bd339e4fd71223a30ffbfd: Really? Thank you for being as useless as I feared.
textByHash.25085d4f18cc7a51aee6d7c05de1cf855ebdfe76: The Disciples of Yama are a big problem. They need dealing with.
textByHash.906dd4e822e16a7a687d02da472df372806a465d: Exactly! They live on his doorstep and he cares more about stupid lizardmen. The man is clearly as incompetent as you.
textByHash.e658e1c49851a32b2f66a2dfd07bcff7b59b8b64: Of course I don't expect you to take on an entire cult! What you need to do is cut the head off the snake. Remove the influence of their leader and they won't be a problem.
textByHash.3bc936473a50b48d376ab6757c6878c0116dcaa2: No. Yama has no presence among his followers. At least, not yet. If you remove their connection to him, he won't be able to communicate with them.
textByHash.d27f6b630e318ab65856d5cb154852d46ca9c380: I know of a mage in Arceuus who's hopefully not as useless as you or Lord Shayzien. Her name is Mori and she's been investigating the Disciples of Yama. She should be able to help.
textByHash.9b5be31e83adff92e5618c99232794127910ce37: Because I did some digging. Oddly enough I wasn't going to ignore a corrupt councillor summoning a demon on my docks.
textByHash.190b064df8caf6201a4d76bbf7d57c7d3f52f440: This conversation is pointless. If you want my support, this is the price. Now go and talk to Mori. I hear she spends most of her time in the Arceuus Church.
textByHash.c60abf09e7850d10a1267e2bc56d94761f84e0a0: Have you spoken to Mori yet?
textByHash.8fe588f33c429bff0b350a4c1c0356a648398a0e: From what I hear, she spends most of her time in the Arceuus Church. Now clear off.
textByHash.52b9378e6ab80b9360253af3ed3f093c39d54f4a: Have you dealt with the Disciples of Yama yet?
textByHash.70f50902abc6bbc6709a2cdb1e29373e02d2828b: Yes, but it's still a stupid idea. And don't even think about trying to put me in charge or something. I'll have no more part in this.
textByHash.14eb7d81ef7c74fa04d182791fe85ab5ee68a9cf: Good. I've had enough of talking with you.
textByHash.e6acbfecbb492e70156c7b008d00d181dc64a529: Shall we get on with this then?
textByHash.27617ba7973eb518a6709ec386c25942ef30fa60: Jumped from the top of the tower, probably. It doesn't matter, the world won't miss him. Let's move on.
textByHash.31855e224e066d06dee55c8502afb2a57eebeee8: For the record, I think this is all a bad idea. Still, you're all clearly set on it, so I won't try and stop you.
textByHash.f3368dc4768c97dac709f79c38811eb71c358072: However, I stand by what I said before. The people should have a say. Anything we decide here should not be finalised until the people have voted on it.
textByHash.718ff8b2562d92d147dc87b2957fbd7974660752: And? Without it, I'm not signing your precious document. If I don't sign, you get nothing.
textByHash.59b05488bf7ca652bfb6a51f20122603f79296e5: Well not me, that's for sure. I can't imagine anything worse. Get one of these fools to do it.
textByHash.0a5feaecda52d8397d0046103a8b1eaf81e01a56: Well... This isn't quite what I expected, but sure. Let the idiot have his throne. As long as the people agree.
textByHash.bde2a51f53032076d8144b67c76ff64ac6302a8f: You are clearly fairly new to Kourend, so you might not be fully aware of our current leadership situation. After the last King died, rulership should have passed on to his daughter. However, she was declared mad.
textByHash.b9f4195d34269cc7041fba2c8b1faf6281825710: It was the King's closest advisors that made this declaration. They took over and became the Kourend Council. They've ruled the kingdom ever since.
textByHash.5ac3b91a996f2415673358d7ebe3b9d1c50cba2c: Now, the councillors are supposedly voted for by the people. However, the seats have been held by the same four people since the start. Pretty suspicious don't you think?
textByHash.1defeb262a1760fcd928ce529a8579aa9db7b81d: Exactly. The Council is clearly corrupt, and we intend to bring that to light. Councillor Hughes is our first target. We have reason to believe that she may be in league with the Disciples of Yama.
textByHash.03b3f9f3f3e28dfdb3b30e20bc6045497b5cc322: A cult of Zamorakians who supposedly serve a demon called Yama.
textByHash.23fb27943ac1e974e5aa75c07cadbcae741d1bb3: They've been a problem for a while, but they haven't been deemed dangerous enough to be properly dealt with. Councillor Hughes' influence, no doubt.
textByHash.8201669225a792463575181b78c332478d3f86f3: Anyway, go to her home and find proof of her corruption. If you find it, you will know I'm telling the truth. If you don't... well don't pretend you care about breaking and entering anyway.
textByHash.2fb14aa0261f52ebf9f6a9928d27456f31a20d20: I'll pretend I didn't hear that. Councillor Hughes' home is on the northern side of Kingstown. Even a fool like you should be able to find it. Don't worry, she's never in.
textByHash.e26f5b93c2744657124d4e5bdb80ca7ebeb7b01b: Once you have the evidence, give it to that Lawry fellow. Provided he's not as useless as you, he'll make sure that she's dealt with.
textByHash.c9abea6bd78c87963b40be4ab59a23b8ad2eeb82: Oh it's you. Are you going to actually let me finish what I'm saying this time or are you just going to walk off again.
textByHash.763e1707a19ca818fb52185e95bfa10b947ed812: Good. In future you should try not to be so rude.
textByHash.4fb4f8fd4e41a4b0bbb2f37c25424085b69a814c: Anyway, you are clearly fairly new to Kourend, so you might not be fully aware of our current leadership situation. After the last King died, rulership should have passed on to his daughter. However, she was declared
textByHash.ab2e25d870761f188866fc7f216caa09f3b4cb6a: Whatever you want I don't care. Come back to me when you've completed your task.
textByHash.7481661fc5f450d9d3d4c24d03c7505b6978e148: I hear Councillor Hughes has been arrested. Perhaps you're not totally useless after all.
textByHash.c0597a798ca76741a866200df310a38d85fa2fce: Oh give me a break. You think I care what you think?
textByHash.93a789871e2d1099dc10df05496ecbae2d24e388: Anyway, I guess this is the part where you expect a reward?
textByHash.a44bb4345cdf4429fdc9ade6f40d85e6f88de8ea: Fine. As much as I hate to admit it, you've done alright. The arrest of Councillor Hughes can only mean good things for Kourend and her people.
textByHash.48c5bb8db0d15ea3ee323b3a7ec1c1e20110e933: This is only the beginning though. There's much work to still be done. I may well call on your help again. Or maybe I won't, who knows. Now take these and go.
textByHash.dfec6e687d560f6c7aa242e7cc683e07cc187df1: For many years I used my position to fight against the crime and corruption in this city. No matter what I did it was never enough though. I realised that to defeat my enemies I needed to act as they do.
textByHash.0c748425302a8658712275dfb431a2da60dcf7c8: That's why I formed the Saviours of Kourend. We take the laws into our own hands and fight against all who would damage this city, no matter who they are.
textByHash.72e1ceeb28bc3894555808358f5fd5e84a425043: You've been here how long? You should know what we do by now.
textByHash.d9c94b48b3f82570ea1fa81eedaff01fb71dfe5c: Port Piscarilius is home to Kourend's fishermen and traders. We are the first port of call for any visitors to Kourend which means Port Piscarilius is home to a wide variety of individuals.
textByHash.3abb0554492824b2f2c0ef8b3a61730cf13dc4b5: All people and goods coming to or from Kourend go through Port Piscarilius. This unfortunatly means that we are a centre point for the majority of crime within the city.
textByHash.d09a3922bff365516f80b93122be476acf46152a: For many years I appealed to the Kourend Council for help in fighting this crime, but they cared little for us. Instead, I decided to beat them at their own game and fight fire with fire.
textByHash.9a15dc2aed6483639b8dd9503f62c3195489ef35: How about you go away then?
textByHash.e5d1c9f79677521d38786e9a3d7f182c371a6d5c: Looking for your reward, idiot? Take it and get lost.
